{'id': 'behavior_1', 'name': 'GetActiveWebMessages', 'description': 'Returns currently active WebMessages. If toUtc provided: GetWebMessagesActiveBetween(from, to). If fromUtc is null or before now: GetWebMessagesActiveBetween(now, now). Supports optional profileId filter, messageType filter, includeDrafts flag.', 'trigger': 'API read via WebMessageController or DriftsstatusModule', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/WebMessages/WebMessageService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_2', 'name': 'GetPlannedWebMessages', 'description': 'Returns WebMessages planned for future: called when fromUtc > now. Uses GetWebMessagesPlannedAfter(customerId, fromUtc). Supports same filters as GetActiveWebMessages.', 'trigger': 'API read when fromUtc is in future', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/WebMessages/WebMessageService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_3', 'name': 'GetExpiredWebMessages', 'description': 'Returns expired WebMessages when onlyExpired=true. Calls GetWebMessagesExpiredBetween(customerId, fromUtc, toUtc ?? now). Preserves DateTimeOffset to avoid server-side UTC conversion errors.', 'trigger': 'API read with onlyExpired=true', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/WebMessages/WebMessageService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_4', 'name': 'CreateWebMessage', 'description': 'Inserts a single WebMessage via InsertWebMessage. Supports SmsGroup-linked draft messages via MarkSmsGroupWebMessagesAsDraft. Bulk insert supported via BulkInsertWebMessages.', 'trigger': 'Message wizard step or API POST', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/WebMessages/WebMessageService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_5', 'name': 'UpdateWebMessage', 'description': 'Updates a WebMessage. UpdateWebMessageAsync (single). UpdateWebMessagesAsync (collection, optional queueWebhookMessages). MergeWebMessagesBySmsGroupIdAndTypeIdAsync: upsert-style merge by SmsGroupId+TypeId.', 'trigger': 'Wizard completion, broadcast re-edit, or webhook queue trigger', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/WebMessages/WebMessageService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_6', 'name': 'SetWebMessageCompleted', 'description': 'Marks a WebMessage as completed (visible as active if completedAsActive=true in reads). Separate from expiry. Called on broadcast resolution.', 'trigger': 'Broadcast resolution / user action', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/WebMessages/WebMessageService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_7', 'name': 'GetWebMessagesForMapModule', 'description': 'Returns WebMessages enriched with geo data for DriftsstatusModule map display. Calls GetWebMessagesForMapModule with mapModuleCustomerSetting, onlyProfileIds, internalOnly, showArchiveDays. Also returns GetProfileMapSettings for per-profile map configuration.', 'trigger': 'DriftsstatusModule map load', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/WebMessages/WebMessageService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_8', 'name': 'WebMessageWebhookDispatch', 'description': "Queues webhook messages for external integration when WebMessages change. CreateAndQueueWebmessageWebhookMessageAsync(customerId, webMessage, action) — action is typically 'created', 'updated', 'deleted'.", 'trigger': 'Any create/update/delete that has webhook subscribers', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/WebMessages/WebMessageService.cs'}

{'id': 'behavior_9', 'name': 'MergeFieldsForWebMessage', 'description': 'Detects and replaces merge fields in web message text. DetectAndMergeMergefieldsForWeb(text, languageId, profileId, countryId, smsGroupId). Returns processed text. Used during preview or publish.', 'trigger': 'Web message text processing at publish/preview', 'source_file': 'ServiceAlert.Services/WebMessages/WebMessageService.cs'}
